title: ENISA International Strategy 2026
content: The ENISA International Strategy sets out how the Agency works with international partners to strengthen cybersecurity across the European Union.

title: ENISA Stakeholder Strategy 2026-2028

content: Including multiannual planning, work programme 2026 and multiannual staff planning.

title: Voices of EU Cybersecurity Certification
content: A special publication by ENISA that incorporates feedback from stakeholders involved in building, maintaining, operating, and applying the first EU cybersecurity certification schemes.

title: NIS Investments 2025

content: This publication presents the annual activity report of ENISA for 2024. The report is based on the 2024 work programme as approved by the agency's Management Board.

title: The EU Cybersecurity Index 2024
content:
The EU Cybersecurity Index (EU-CSI) is a tool, developed by ENISA in collaboration with the Member States, to describe the cybersecurity posture of Member States and the EU.

title: Cyber Europe 2024 - After Action Report
